pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: task from AI & ML Infrastructure (affinity 0.28); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is strong (0.5077). A Data Trustee would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Trustee whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
